## Governance checklist

- [ ] Edit set is scoped and named; nothing unrelated touched
- [ ] `verify-layout.sh` passes (CI runs it as advisory feedback)
- [ ] Structural additions update `verify-layout.sh` REQUIRED_PATHS + README layout tree in this same change
- [ ] No secrets: no credentials, hostnames, tenant identifiers, or personal data beyond public maintainer roles (aliases only)
- [ ] Scope respected (root Article III): project-scoped work stays in its tree
- [ ] WIP content: this PR claims NO approval — promotion/implementation require the maintainer's explicit Gate 1/Gate 2 directives
- [ ] Constitutional text untouched, or changed via the documented Amendment Procedure with version bump
